typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	folder_path as string,
	input_file_name as string
}
source(output(
		equipment as string,
		equipment_class as string,
		entered_date as string,
		requested_completion as string,
		completed_date as string,
		last_modified as string,
		status as string,
		work_class as string,
		iso9000 as string,
		workers as string,
		wo_planned_hours as string,
		down_hours as string,
		res_planned_hours as string,
		actual_hours as string,
		planned_hours_total as string,
		internal_labor as string,
		contract_labor as string,
		internal_nonstock as string,
		contract_nonstock as string,
		stores_material as string,
		services as string,
		internal_tool as string,
		contract_tool as string,
		internal_other as string,
		contract_other as string,
		wo_base as string,
		wo_task as string,
		wo_subtask as string,
		failure_flag as string,
		planned_labor as string,
		planned_nonstock as string,
		planned_stores as string,
		planned_services as string,
		planned_tools as string,
		plant as string,
		resource_id as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: true,
	purgeFiles: true,
	rowUrlColumn: 'File_Path',
	wildcardPaths:[($folder_path+'/'+$input_file_name+'_*_*.csv')]) ~> srcTabwareStage
srcTabwareStage derive(File_Path = concat(concat(trim(substringIndex(File_Path,'/',4),'/'),'/'),substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),1,4),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),6,2),'/',substring(toString(currentTimestamp()),9,2),'/',$input_file_name,'_',replace(replace(toString(currentTimestamp()),'.',''),':',''),'.csv')) ~> setFileName
setFileName sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	rowUrlColumn:'File_Path',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true) ~> snkTabwareRaw
